entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop studied for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The height of the sorghum plant, where tall genotypes showed more resistance

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The time from planting to flowering, where late-maturing genotypes showed more resistance

entities.name: ATHERIGONA SOCCATA
entities.description: The shoot fly pest that affects sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum lines to resist infestation by Atherigona soccata

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE GLOSSINESS
entities.description: The intensity of glossiness on the leaf surface, where high gloss intensity correlates with resistance

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: The research approach used to investigate the effect of plant height and days to flower on pest incidence

relationships.description: Tall plant height is associated with higher resistance to A. soccata
Late flowering is associated with higher resistance to A. soccata
High gloss intensity is associated with higher resistance to A. soccata
The target pest for which resistance is measured
Exhibits varying levels of resistance to A. soccata
